Title: A high-quality genome assembly of the tetraploid Teucrium chamaedrys unveils a recent wholegenome duplication and a large biosynthetic gene cluster for diterpenoid metabolism

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Cyclizes geranylgeranyl diphosphate (GGDP/GGPP) to iso-kolavenyl diphosphate (iso-KDP), observed via dephosphorylated products iso-kolavelool and iso-kolavenol in transient assays.
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Medicinal specialized metabolites widely utilized in traditional and modern medicine.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes formation of the iso-KDP precursor underlying clerodane diterpenoid biosynthesis in Teucrium chamaedrys.
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. TchaTPS1 was one of the predicted clerodane synthase homologs functionally characterized in this study. 2. In Agrobacterium-mediated Nicotiana benthamiana transient expression, it produced products diagnostic of iso-KDP synthase activity. 3. The enzyme supports the conclusion that T. chamaedrys clerodane metabolism proceeds from an iso-KDP precursor.
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: pEAQ-HT expression vector; promoter type NA
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Predicted clerodane synthase homolog studied from T. chamaedrys; tissue-resolved high-expression pattern for TchaTPS1 not explicitly stated.
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: terpene synthase; diterpene synthase (class II clerodane synthase homolog)
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Agrobacterium-mediated transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana; co-expression with sclareol synthase (SsSS); GC-MS metabolite profiling; comparison with reference enzyme ArTPS2
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Greenhouse-grown source plants; transient leaf expression in N. benthamiana under controlled 12-h light/12-h dark at 22°C
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq of T. chamaedrys mature leaves and roots, SRA: PRJNA1124528; genomic WGS and FLcDNA reads, SRA: PRJNA1246154
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful entry enzyme for engineering iso-KDP-derived clerodane diterpenoid production; could be stacked with downstream CYPs and partner diTPS genes in reconstruction of medicinal diterpenoid pathways.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: All active enzymes tested produced iso-KDP and none gave conclusive evidence for dedicated (-)-KDP synthase activity in T. chamaedrys.

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Cyclizes geranylgeranyl diphosphate (GGDP/GGPP) to iso-kolavenyl diphosphate (iso-KDP), inferred from iso-kolavelool and iso-kolavenol detected after transient expression.
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Medicinal specialized metabolites widely utilized in traditional and modern medicine.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes formation of the iso-KDP precursor for clerodane diterpenoid biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. TchaTPS2 was functionally characterized among T. chamaedrys clerodane synthase homologs. 2. Transient expression assays demonstrated iso-KDP synthase activity. 3. The result supports iso-KDP as the biosynthetic basis of T. chamaedrys clerodane metabolism.
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: pEAQ-HT expression vector; promoter type NA
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: terpene synthase; diterpene synthase (class II clerodane synthase homolog)
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Agrobacterium-mediated transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana; co-expression with SsSS; GC-MS; reference comparison with ArTPS2
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Controlled growth room, 12-h light/12-h dark at 22°C for N. benthamiana infiltration assays
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq of T. chamaedrys mature leaves and roots, SRA: PRJNA1124528; genomic WGS and FLcDNA reads, SRA: PRJNA1246154
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate scaffold-forming enzyme for metabolic engineering of clerodane diterpenoids in heterologous hosts.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Like other active enzymes assayed, it yielded no conclusive evidence for (-)-KDP formation.

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Cyclizes geranylgeranyl diphosphate (GGDP/GGPP) to iso-kolavenyl diphosphate (iso-KDP), detected through diagnostic dephosphorylation products in transient assays.
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Medicinal specialized metabolites widely utilized in traditional and modern medicine.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Generates the iso-KDP precursor feeding clerodane diterpenoid biosynthesis.
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. TchaTPS3 was biochemically tested as a predicted clerodane synthase homolog. 2. It showed iso-KDP synthase activity in the heterologous transient system. 3. This further supports multiple redundant/expanded iso-KDP synthases in tetraploid T. chamaedrys.
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: pEAQ-HT expression vector; promoter type NA
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: terpene synthase; diterpene synthase (class II clerodane synthase homolog)
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Agrobacterium-mediated transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana; co-expression with SsSS; GC-MS; reference comparison with ArTPS2
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Controlled growth room, 12-h light/12-h dark at 22°C for N. benthamiana infiltration assays
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: RNA-seq of T. chamaedrys mature leaves and roots, SRA: PRJNA1124528; genomic WGS and FLcDNA reads, SRA: PRJNA1246154
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful alternative iso-KDP synthase for pathway reconstruction and combinatorial diterpenoid engineering.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Part of a broadened diTPS family associated with genomic clustering and duplication in Teucrium.

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Cyclizes geranylgeranyl diphosphate (GGDP/GGPP) to iso-kolavenyl diphosphate (iso-KDP), inferred from GC-MS detection of iso-kolavelool/iso-kolavenol products in transient assays.
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Medicinal specialized metabolites widely utilized in traditional and modern medicine.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Produces the iso-KDP precursor associated with clerodane diterpenoid formation.
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. TcanTPS1 from T. canadense was tested alongside T. chamaedrys homologs. 2. It showed iso-KDP synthase activity in Nicotiana benthamiana transient expression assays. 3. This indicates conservation of clerodane precursor formation across Teucrium species.
Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: pEAQ-HT expression vector; promoter type NA
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Derived from transcriptomic data; detailed expression pattern not stated.
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: terpene synthase; diterpene synthase (class II clerodane synthase homolog)
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Agrobacterium-mediated transient expression in Nicotiana benthamiana; co-expression with SsSS; GC-MS; reference comparison with ArTPS2
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Controlled growth room, 12-h light/12-h dark at 22°C for N. benthamiana infiltration assays
Pathway_Genes.Omics_Data: T. canadense transcriptome assembled from SRA: SRR5150734
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Broadens the toolkit of iso-KDP synthases for comparative pathway engineering across Teucrium species.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although characterized in this paper, the focal paper centers on T. chamaedrys metabolism; included because it is experimentally characterized in the Results as part of the gene–metabolite analysis.
